about.title: Our Expert
about.name: Deniz Sinanoğlu
about.description: With over 20 years of experience, I help individuals and families create lasting and positive changes in their lives. In my clinic in Çanakkale, I combine modern therapy methods with empathy and professionalism.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.subtitle: How Does the Therapy Process Work?

step1.title: Introduction and Assessment
step1.description: In the first session, we identify your needs and goals together.

step2.title: Tailored Therapy Plan
step2.description: We create a roadmap using the most appropriate scientific methods for you.

step3.title: Continuous Support and Growth
step3.description: We stay by your side throughout the process, making your well-being sustainable.

q1.question: How long does the first session last?
q1.answer: Our first session lasts 50-60 minutes, focusing on introduction and general assessment.

q2.question: How frequent should the sessions be?
q2.answer: Depending on your needs, we generally recommend meeting once a week, but this can be updated together during the process.

q3.question: Is online therapy effective?
q3.answer: Yes, research shows that in many cases, online therapy is as effective as face-to-face therapy.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: Koridor Psychology and Our Therapy Approach

hero.title: Koridor Psychology
hero.subtitle: A Safe, Non-Judgmental, and Empathetic Therapeutic Ground

philosophy.title: Welcome!
philosophy.p1: Our emotional challenges, which can limit our existence in freedom and well-being, originate from painful life experiences. These experiences sometimes disrupt the normal flow of our childhood experiences, and at times, they may stay with us into our adult lives.
philosophy.p2: Psychotherapy opens a space to explore all kinds of emotions, including anxiety, depression, meaninglessness, loss of self-worth, anger, and grief, which each of us feels in different textures. In summary, there are reasons why we feel the way we do, and psychotherapy is structured around this meaning.

founding.title: Founding and Mission
founding.content: Aiming to base this process of mutual discovery and restoring well-being on a safe, non-judgmental, and empathetic therapeutic ground, Koridor Psychology was founded in 2021 by Specialist Psychologist Hatice Karatepe Öztürk and Specialist Psychologist Beliz Göncü.

methods.title: Schools and Services
methods.intro: In our clinic, services for children, adolescents, adults, family therapies, and corporate consultancy are provided.
methods.holistic: At Koridor Psychology, holistic work is considered highly valuable, and in necessary cases, a coordinated treatment approach is carried out with psychiatry specialists, sensory integration specialists, nutritionists, social workers, school guidance units, and educators.

workshops.title: Training and Workshops
workshops.content: Additionally, at certain periods, training and workshops are organized in our clinic to provide an experience and benefit to individuals interested in these fields.

closing.content: You can also access more information, current articles provided by the Koridor Psychology team, and corporate announcements through our website.

cta.title: We Are Here to Help You

deniz-sinanoglu.name: Deniz Sinanoğlu
deniz-sinanoglu.bio: After graduating from Hacettepe University's Psychology department, I completed my specialization in family counseling. For 20 years in Çanakkale, I have accompanied hundreds of clients on their healing journeys.

onlineTherapyPage.intro: Online therapy combines the advantages of traditional face-to-face therapy with the flexibility of digital platforms.
